instruction: Can you get the New York release gate ready? Check the current model, what's already on the board, and what's already on the calendar before you update the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync.
canonical_instruction: I need the New York release gate tightened up. Please confirm the current model, check the board and calendar first, then refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.
instruction_variants: Please get the New York release gate into shape. Confirm the current model, check the board and calendar first, then update the handoff file, the New York next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.
Can you tighten up the New York release gate? Check the current model and the existing board and calendar state first, then refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync.

Please get the New York release gate sorted out. Confirm the current model, review the board and calendar first, then update the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.

I need the New York release gate tightened up. Please confirm the current model, check the board and calendar first, then refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.

The New York release gate still needs to be cleaned up. Please review the current model plus the board and calendar state before you refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync.

Please get the New York release gate into good shape. Check the current model and the current board and calendar state first, then refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.

I need the New York release gate wrapped up properly. Confirm the current model, review the board and calendar first, then refresh the handoff file, the next step on the board, and the sync on the calendar.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'New York release gate handoff notes.'
tasks add --title 'New York release gate follow-through' --priority high --due 2026-03-14
calendar add-event --title 'New York release gate sync' --start 2026-03-17T09:00
